# Risk Scoring Ontology (CONCEPT:KG-2.7)

## Overview
Domain-agnostic risk assessment with `RiskAssessmentNode`, `RiskFactorNode`, `RiskMitigationNode`. OWL `propagatesRiskTo` enables transitive upstream risk chain inference.
